name: Art History
source: Fall 2026 Art and Visual Studies Advising Checklis.pdf

sections.label: Three Additional Art History Courses (at least one must be 200-level or above)
sections.description: Any three ARH courses (at least one must be 200+). HIS-318, COM-161, or MS-105 may count as one — confirm with advisor.

sections.label: One 100- or 300-level ART Studio Course
sections.description: Any 100-level or 300-level ART studio course (not a 200-level).
sections.note: Must be 100- or 300-level; 200-level ART courses do not satisfy this requirement.
